app_tagline: A calm tool for keeping a record of housing problems where you live. It runs on your own device.
meta_description: A private tool tenants can use to record housing problems and keep the proof on their own device.
alpha_warning: Alpha software — do not rely on this for real legal matters yet.
next_intro: Add the next fact to this condition. A missing step stays visibly missing.
atlas_lede: Follow each condition, notice, response, and supporting item in the order recorded.
atlas_empty: Add a condition, photo, or update to begin the repair trail.
atlas_summary: {count, plural, one {# point in the record} other {# points in the record}}
inspector_empty_body: Its reported date, source, links, and technical handling will appear here.
proof_sealed: Saved and sealed on this device
proof_timestamped: Timestamp token attached; authority trust is checked separately
proof_awaiting: Saved and sealed; waiting for a timestamp token
proof_timeline_bound: Bound to the evidence trail when it was added
proof_linked: Linked to {count, plural, one {# other record point} other {# other record points}}
record_kicker: Add one fact at a time
record_intro: Each action becomes part of the same case story. You can close the app after a capture is saved.
readiness_empty: Add a capture to begin documenting this case.
readiness_progress: {timestamped} of {total} captures have timestamp tokens attached. Authority trust is checked separately.
share_statement: Review the whole-unit record before creating a copy for someone else.
share_fact_local: The export is created on this device.
share_fact_metadata: Shared copies remove photo metadata by default.
share_fact_scope: The current packet includes the whole unit.
rail_awaiting: {count, plural, =0 {No timestamps waiting} one {# timestamp waiting} other {# timestamps waiting}}
status_awaiting_help: Your photo is already sealed and safe on this device. A timestamp token can attach next time you're online; its validity and authority trust are separate checks.
status_timestamped_help: Sealed with a timestamp token attached; a recipient must still verify the token and authority.
storage_doubling_note: Sealed originals are kept twice by design: the encrypted original, plus a shareable copy when you export.
resolve_help: Only a file fingerprint is sent to the timestamp service. Authority trust is checked separately.
msg_resolved: {count, plural, =0 {No timestamp tokens were missing.} one {Added # missing timestamp token.} other {Added # missing timestamp tokens.}}
issues_empty_next: No conditions yet. Add the first condition to begin.
issue_timeline_count: {count, plural, one {# timeline entry} other {# timeline entries}}
issue_none_available: No conditions yet — add one first
strength_detail: {strong} strong, {developing} developing, {minimal} minimal · {timeline, plural, one {# linked timeline entry} other {# linked timeline entries}}
strength_caveat: Record strength reflects token presence, custody, and corroborating timeline — not token validity, authority trust, a legal judgment, or admissibility.
field_dev_tsa_help: For trying out the app without internet. A practice timestamp is untrusted and never evidence-ready. Leave it off for real evidence.
capture_awaiting_reassure: Your photo is already saved and sealed with its content hash. It can receive a timestamp token the next time you are online — choose “Add missing timestamp tokens” above. The token’s validity and authority trust are checked separately.
field_occurred_at_help: This is the date you report. The app separately records when you added this entry.
timeline_links_help: Links keep the condition, notice, delivery, and response together in the exported packet.
field_artifact_source: How did you get this copy?
profile_review_help: Some workflows require external review before pilot use.
issue_artifacts_count: {count, plural, =0 {No documents} one {# document} other {# documents}}
export_scope_help: Issue-scoped exports are temporarily blocked because the current custody proof can reveal records outside the selected issue.
field_include_originals_help: The originals are your full-quality photos, kept locked in your vault. They can still hold location and other hidden details, so include them only when the recipient needs them.
verify_ready: Integrity intact · timestamp authority trusted · evidence-ready
verify_intact_untrusted: Integrity intact · timestamp authority not trusted · not evidence-ready
verify_awaiting: Integrity intact · awaiting timestamps · not evidence-ready
footer_note: Photos and case details stay on this device. If you request a timestamp, only the file fingerprint is sent. Nothing is shared until you create a copy.
msg_profile_review_required: Workflow selected. External review is still required before pilot use.
msg_export_done_ok: Packet exported and technically evidence-ready. This does not decide admissibility.
msg_export_done_untrusted: Packet exported with intact structure, but timestamp authority trust was not established. It is not evidence-ready; verify with an independently trusted certificate.
msg_export_done_warn: Packet exported, but an integrity or timestamp verification check failed.
msg_export_done_awaiting: {count, plural, one {Packet exported. # item is still awaiting a timestamp, so the packet is not evidence-ready yet.} other {Packet exported. # items are still awaiting timestamps, so the packet is not evidence-ready yet.}}
export_awaiting_next: The content hash already anchors each awaiting item at capture. Next step: use 'Resolve awaiting timestamps' when you have a connection, then export again.
error_fallback: Something went wrong. Please try again.
error_occurred_at_required: Please enter the date it happened.
error_artifact_required: Choose a condition and document, then enter its title, source, and date.
error_relationship_required: Choose an issue and enter both record IDs.
error_file_read: Could not read the selected file.
error_lang_load: Could not load that language. Keeping the current one.
